results.name: fire drake
results.description: A small family of drakes with once-only firebreathing abilities.

results.name: first-person
results.description: Artwork from the first-person perspective of someone diegetically present.

results.name: fisheye perspective
results.description: An ultra-wide angle that distorts the view to fit more information into the rectangular plane. Usually recognisable by a distinctly curved horizon line.

results.name: flamberge
results.description: Swords with a wavy pattern, almost flame-like.

results.name: flaming arrow
results.description: An arrow that has been set on fire, usually to set something else on fire at range.

results.name: flat cap
results.description: A cap with a flatter top. Including newsboy caps.

results.name: flattened
results.description: Depicts a person, creature, or object that has been squashed under a much heavier person, creature, or object.

results.name: flavor matters
results.description: Not to be confused with [flavor text matters](/tags/card/flavor-text-matters)

results.name: flavors of vanilla
results.description: Magic has various flavors of "vanilla", referencing cards with no abilities or only keyword abilities. For vanilla creatures (those with no abilities) see [is:vanilla](https://scryfall.com/search?q=is%3Avanilla) in Scryfall search.

results.name: flavor text errata
results.description: These cards have received errata to change their flavor text.

results.name: flavor text typo
results.description: This print has a typo in its flavor text.

results.name: flayed
results.description: Having a being's skin removed while remaining alive (or animated in general).

results.name: fleeing
results.description: Things running away from other things.

results.name: flicker
results.description: Exile a card then return it to the battlefield (now or soon).

results.name: flicker-nonland
results.description: Flicker effects that work on all permanent types other than land.

results.name: flicker-permanent
results.description: Flicker effects that work on all permanent types: artifact, creature, enchantment, land, planeswalker, and battle.

results.name: flicker-slow
results.description: Exile a card to be brought back after a set time (usually at end of turn).

results.name: fling
results.description: Creatures being thrown or tossed in the air.

results.name: fling
results.description: Sacrifice a creature to deal its power in damage to something. See also [bombard](/tags/card/bombard), [one-sided fight](/tags/card/one-sided-fight), [fling-self](fling-self).

results.name: fling-self
results.description: Sacrifice this creature to deal its power in damage. See also [bombard-self](/tags/card/bombard-self), [fling](fling).

results.name: floating
results.description: Floating in midair.
